creator: monwarez@mailoo.org
text:
It seems that every time I update nextcloud I get this kind of issue with the federation, files_trashbin and federatedfilesharing app upgrade.
The occ upgrade will want to update this app every time (if I call occ upgrade twice it will attempt to update these apps).

Updating <federation> ...
Updated <federation> to 1.12.0
Updating <files_trashbin> ...
Updated <files_trashbin> to 1.12.0
Updating <federatedfilesharing> ...
Updated <federatedfilesharing> to 1.12.0

My question is now why the update to non released version of nextcloud ?
the tags v22.2.0 is not a release, the latest release is v22.1.1 .
And of course since nextcloud prevent downgrading it is a pain to downgrade..
